n: Instance: The Great Goblin in Exile

steps.t: Langhár is ready to explain her plan to enter the goblin hideout. You should talk to Langhár.
Langhár has asked you to get closer to the cave entrance before she alerts the goblins. You should get into position, and then <rgb=#FF00FF>wave…
Langhár has drawn the attention of the goblins in Waldfast. You should sneak behind them and find the cave she mentioned.
You should investigate the cave to find evidence of why the goblins are here and how many they number.
You have found the Great Goblin and a large number of goblins loyal to him. You should listen to him speak to his followers to see what you can learn.
You have learned much about the Great Goblin's situation. You should return to Langhár and tell her this new information.
